metadata.description: Swift iOS architecture guidance and playbooks for MVVM, MVI, TCA, Clean Architecture, VIPER, MVP, Coordinator, and Reactive patterns. Use when designing, implementing, refactoring, or reviewing the architecture of a SwiftUI or UIKit feature, module, or codebase.

plugins.name: swift-architecture-skill
plugins.description: Swift architecture Agent Skill with playbooks for MVVM, MVI, TCA, Clean Architecture, VIPER, and Reactive.
